access_config.description: Configuration settings for accessing the EKS cluster, including authentication mode and admin permissions for the creator.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EKS cluster.

certificate_authority.description: The certificate authority data for the EKS cluster.

cluster_id.description: The unique identifier for the EKS cluster.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the EKS cluster was created.

enabled_cluster_log_types.description: A set of log types that are enabled for the EKS cluster.

endpoint.description: The endpoint URL for the EKS cluster API server.

id.description: The unique identifier for the EKS cluster, similar to the cluster_id.

identity.description: Identity configuration for the EKS cluster, including OIDC issuer.

kubernetes_network_config.description: Network configuration settings for the Kubernetes cluster within EKS.

outpost_config.description: Configuration for using AWS Outposts with the EKS cluster, including instance types and placements.

platform_version.description: The platform version of the EKS cluster.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role associated with the EKS cluster.

status.description: The current status of the EKS cluster (e.g., ACTIVE, CREATING).

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the EKS cluster.

upgrade_policy.description: Policies related to upgrades of the EKS cluster.

version.description: The Kubernetes version running on the EKS cluster.

vpc_config.description: Configuration for the VPC associated with the EKS cluster, including security groups and subnets.

zonal_shift_config.description: Configuration for zonal shifts in the EKS cluster, indicating whether it is enabled.
